title: STATUS Mechanical Luggage Scale with 1 m Tape Measure, Portable Analog Travel Weighing Scale up to 32 kg Capacity for Suitcases & Bags, (SMLSCALE1PK4)
features: 32 KG LIMIT This mechanical luggage scale can measure up to 32 kg, making it perfect for weighing your suitcase and ensuring it meets airline weight restrictions. Avoid extra fees for overweight luggage by checking the weight before you leave for the airport.

EASY TO GRIP HANDLE The ergonomic handle design provides a comfortable grip, making it easy to hold and use the scale even with heavy luggage. This ensures a firm hold and accurate readings without strain.

INCLUDES 1M TAPE MEASURE Comes with a built-in 1 metre tape measure, allowing you to check the dimensions of your luggage as well. This feature is particularly useful for ensuring your bags meet size requirements for carry-on or checked baggage.

MECHANICAL ACCURACY The mechanical design of this luggage scale offers precise and reliable weight measurements without the need for batteries. It features a reset knob on top to help recalibrate after usage, ensuring consistent accuracy every time.

PORTABLE AND DURABLE Compact and lightweight, this luggage scale is easy to pack and carry, making it a handy tool for any traveller. Its robust construction ensures it can withstand the rigours of travel and frequent use.
description: From the manufacturer Holiday Prep Made Easy Your perfect travel companion for seamless power access across Europe. This innovative device features a UK-to-EU plug adapter, allowing you to connect and power your devices effortlessly while abroad. Equipped with both USB-A and USB-C ports, it caters to a wide range of devices, from older gadgets to the latest smartphones and tablets, ensuring you're always connected. The 1.4-metre cable provides ample reach, allowing you to position your devices conveniently, whether you're in a hotel room, airport lounge, or café. Designed with portability in mind, the compact size of this socket extension makes it easy to slip into your luggage or carry-on, ensuring that you have access to reliable power wherever you go. STATUS UK to EU Travel Plug Adapter with USB-A & USB-C Ports UK TO EU PLUG ADAPTER: This travel socket extension features a UK to EU plug adapter. USB-A AND USB-C PORTS: Equipped with one USB-A and one USB-C port. 1.4 METRE CABLE: Ensuring easy access to power outlets. COMPACT AND PORTABLE: Its compact design makes it easy to carry in your luggage. Features Compact Design Travel hair dryer, engineered for style and on-the-go convenience. With its compact design and foldable handle, it's the ultimate space-saving solution for your travels. Don't let its small size fool you – our travel hair dryer packs a powerful punch, delivering salon-quality results wherever you wander. With adjustable settings and a concentrator nozzle, it's versatile enough to create any hairstyle, from sleek and straight to bouncy curls. Socket Adaptors Stay connected no matter where your travels take you with our versatile Plug Adaptors. Designed for seamless compatibility between UK and EU outlets, our adaptors ensure you stay powered up wherever you roam. With their sturdy construction and user-friendly design, you can count on them to keep you connected throughout your journey. Upgrade your travel experience with our Plug Adaptors – your essential companion for staying powered up on the go. Luggage Straps Secure your luggage in style with our vibrant luggage straps. Available in an array of eye-catching colours including green, pink, yellow, blue, and multi-coloured, our straps add a pop of personality to your travel gear while providing essential security. Crafted from durable materials and featuring adjustable straps, our luggage straps are designed to fit a variety of suitcase sizes and shapes, ensuring a snug and secure fit. Not only do our luggage straps offer practicality and security, but they also make your luggage easy to spot on the baggage carousel, saving you time and hassle at the airport. Travel Bottles Introducing your travel must-have: our set of plastic travel bottles. Designed for convenience and portability, these bottles are perfect for storing your favourite toiletries and liquids while on the go. Each set comes with different bottle sizes and shapes, allowing you to customise your travel kit to fit your needs. Compact and lightweight, our travel bottles are TSA-approved, making them ideal for carry-on luggage. Pack smart, travel light, and enjoy every moment of your journey. Accessories Prepare for your travels with our comprehensive range of travel accessories. From reliable padlocks to convenient pill organizers for hassle-free medication management, we have everything you need for a stress-free trip. Compact yet powerful, our Tuscan Travel Iron is the perfect solution for keeping your clothes wrinkle-free on the road. With its dual voltage capability and compact design, it's tailor-made for jet-setters and adventurers alike. Travel smarter, lighter, and more efficiently with our collection of must-have essentials. Luggage weight Enhance your travel setup with our assortment of luggage scales. Bid farewell to unwelcome surprises at airport check-ins with our high-tech digital luggage scale. Featuring an intuitive LCD and user-friendly controls, it ensures precise weight measurements for your bags, saving you from unexpected overweight baggage charges. Alternatively, opt for our classic analog luggage scale for a timeless approach to luggage weighing. With its practical hook design, it effortlessly attaches to your bags, delivering accurate weight readings with ease.
